ext_description.message: Quickly archive to ChunChuGwan and view history

connect_intro.message: Connect by pasting a key issued on the Personal API Key page in your dashboard.

connect_open_issue.message: Open Personal API Key page (issue key)

connect_warn.message: Paste the key from the Personal API Key page — not your ChunChuGwan password.

archive_intro.message: Archive the page you are viewing, or the whole site.

archive_with_login.message: Include my login (sends this site's cookies or token)

archive_login_note.message: Sends only your login session cookies or token (JWT) — never your password or ID; the server discards them right after capture. The method is detected automatically. Applies to both a single page and the whole site.

archive_login_https_only.message: Including login info is only available on https pages.

login_detected_jwt.message: JWT token detected — will send the token

archive_private_warn.message: Local network address — you may need to set a network tag in the dashboard.

archive_notify_hint.message: You'll get a notification when it finishes.

archive_server_intro.message: Or let the server capture it (sends the URL only):

capture_hint.message: Captures what you're viewing right now, directly in the browser, and uploads it (the server never re-fetches the page).

capture_notice.message: The debugger attaches briefly to take a full-page screenshot. Web security programs (antivirus, keyboard-security, etc.) may detect or interfere with the capture, so it might not save correctly. If captured while logged in, the snapshot may contain sensitive information and is visible to all users.

capture_needs_tag.message: Local network address ($1) — pick or add a network tag.

err_permission_all.message: All-sites access is required to fetch resources.

err_unsupported_page.message: This page can't be captured in the browser (chrome://, web store, etc.).

err_too_large.message: The capture is too large to upload.

err_capture_failed.message: Capture failed (a web security program may have blocked it).

err_tag_perm.message: You don't have permission to create network tags (admin only).

history_none.message: This URL has not been archived yet.

err_no_archive.message: This token does not have archive permission.

err_no_view.message: This token does not have view permission.

err_credential_disabled.message: Authenticated capture is disabled on the server.

notif_need_permission.message: Browser capture needs all-sites access — allow it once from the popup.

notif_need_tag.message: Local network address — pick a network tag in the popup to capture.

msg_auth_lost.message: Authentication expired — you've been disconnected. Please reconnect.

err_rate_limited.message: Too many requests — please try again shortly.

status_badge_toggle.message: Show on the icon whether this page is archived

tag_pick_hint.message: Local network address — pick a tag before capturing.
